title: Komaroviopsis
taxonomy: Komaroviopsis is a genus of conifers in the family Podocarpaceae. The classification of Komaroviopsis places it as a part of the division Pinophyta, class Pinopsida, and order Podocarpales. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan. Komaroviopsis is closely related to other coniferous plants such as Podocarpus and Prumnopitys. The classification of Komaroviopsis has been studied extensively in the field of botany.
